content.json:
# Azure Governance Platform Dashboard

Real-time monitoring of tenant compliance, costs, and identity.

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp > ago(1h)
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 5m), resultCode
| render timechart
content.title: Request Volume & Status Codes (Last Hour)

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp > ago(1h)
| summarize avg(duration), percentiles(duration, 50, 95, 99) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: Response Time Percentiles (Last Hour)

content.query:
exceptions
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize count() by type
| render piechart
content.title: Exceptions by Type (Last 24 Hours)
